S.n: Results-Only Work Environments Outperform Presence-Based Cultures

B.x: BEST PRACTICES
Results-Only Work Environments Outperform Presence-Based Cultures
We stopped measuring hours and started measuring outcomes. Productivity went up 23% in the first quarter.
B.author: CTO, Series B Fintech, 200-person distributed team

I: Set OKRs and KPIs instead of monitoring screen time
Trust by default, verify through output, not activity
Celebrate async wins publicly to build distributed culture

B.x: Companies using ROWE models see 35% lower attrition and 19% higher performance scores than traditional remote setups.
